title: John Robin Inston
text: I am a PhD candidate in the department of statistics and applied probability at the University of California Santa Barbara. My research interests lie within the intersection of financial mathematics, stochastic games, probability theory and groundwater conservation.

title: Welcome To My Blog
text:
This is the first post in a Quarto blog. Welcome!

Since this post doesn’t specify an explicit image, the first image in the post will be used in the listing page of posts.
